creator: dch@freebsd.org
text:
I can repro this in ~ 5 minutes on my arm64 router, while doing some web loadgen
testing through it using wrk2 (not in ports yet).

$ wrk -d 120s -c 200 -t 8 -L -R 800 https://whiskey.skunkwerks.at/

- 15.0-CURRENT GENERIC arm64
- built from 20250315 at d2a55e6a9348 (upstream/main) openssl: update ASM and version info for 3.0.16 import

(kgdb) bt
